title: Daryle Lamoureux Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Daryle Lamoureux Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Daryle Lamoureux
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’22
Portland Campus
For Daryle Lamoureux, what began as a corporate partnership with Khoury College grew into a budding interest for exploring computer science. After learning about the Align program, he decided to transition careers, and has since doubled his salary in his new tech position.
Going from my previous job to where I am now, I about doubled my salary. So this gave me the opportunity to grow professionally. From that perspective – from a paycheck – it was worth it
Daryle Lamoureux, Align MSCS ’22
Explore all Khoury stories
